no: AI scripts for pre-buffing, celestials, and simulacrum. Installs after EET_End. Completely overwrites BDDEFAI.BCS with custom AI script. Any prior BDDEFAI modifications by other mods will be lost. WIZARD_MIND_BLANK warnings are non-fatal (spell not added if SCS IWD imports not installed).
ic: Olvyn Spells, maybe magic battles revised

conflicts.reason: SCS cn:5000 (Ease-of-use Party AI) and EPS cn:15 (Pre-Buffing) both provide player party automation scripts. They can coexist — SCS provides basic party AI (auto-attack, auto-heal), EPS provides pre-combat buffing sequences. EPS scripts are assigned to specific party members and don't override SCS party AI assignments. SCS cn:5900 (Initialize AI) is enemy AI infrastructure — no overlap with EPS player scripts. EPS cn:9 (Celestials) and cn:10 (Simulacrum) enhance summoned creature AI — complementary with SCS enemy AI. Install SCS before EPS so EPS scripts layer on top.
conflicts.source: EPS pre-buffing scripts layer on top of SCS party AI; cn:9/10 enhance summoned creatures independently, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: KLATU's Modal Buff AI Script overlaps with Enhanced Powergaming Scripts' buff automation
Both provide party AI scripts. Use one or the other

advisories.reason: Mechanism-verified, failure NOT observed in any preserved WSETUP.DEBUG across our test cycles. Both mods are by morpheus562. Trace: Morpheus562's Kitpack cn:1101 (Stormlord: Assign to Jaheira) creates MOSTL02.SPL in override. mih_metamod cn:4 'Clean up override folder' moves .SPL files into mh#clean.bif and deletes them from override/ (verified: cleanup_override.tpa preserve list excludes .spl). EPS initialize.tpa:1345 does COPY_EXISTING ~MOSTL02.SPL~ override when Stormlord is detected. WeiDU's COPY_EXISTING should resolve MOSTL02.SPL from the user-created mh#clean.bif, so the downstream failure 'Resource [MOSTL02.SPL] not found' should not fire. No session has ever been observed to produce that error. Surfaces as an advisory only — if you run with mih_metamod cn:4 enabled and see the MOSTL02 not-found error in WSETUP.DEBUG, report it and we'll promote this to an observed conflict.
advisories.source: Code trace 2026-04-21: morpheus562-s-kitpack stormlord tph creates MOSTL02.SPL; mih_metamod cleanup_override.tpa preserve list verified; EPS initialize.tpa:1345 COPY_EXISTING verified. No WSETUP.DEBUG match for 'Resource \[MOSTL02\.SPL\] not found' across all preserved install logs.

advisories.reason: Mod-level note from install guide. Olvyn celestial/simulacrum spell modifications may affect EPS AI scripts. Does NOT apply to cn:980/990 (ranger/paladin progression, the only Olvyn ). Neither detects the other.
advisories.theirComps: Celestial/Simulacrum spell components (not cn:980/990 which are the only Olvyn in Ultimate preset)

ki.description: Speculative detector — never observed to fire. Kept in place as a canary: EPS initialize.tpa:1345 does COPY_EXISTING ~MOSTL02.SPL~ override when Stormlord is detected, and mih_metamod cn:4 moves .SPL files from override/ into mh#clean.bif. WeiDU's COPY_EXISTING should still resolve from the biff, so this failure should not fire. If it does fire, the corresponding advisories[morpheus562skitpack] entry gets promoted from mechanism-verified to observed.
ki.workaround: If you see this in WSETUP.DEBUG, report it with the session ID so we can promote the advisory to a confirmed conflict. Short-term workaround: install EPS before mih_metamod cn:4.

ki.description: All EPS components may silently skip when installed in the POST EET phase after eet_end, due to REQUIRE_PREDICATE or AT_INTERACTIVE_EXIT conditions that fail in the finalized game state. Observed in session 88733aac (2026-04-16): batch 510 — 0 ok, 3 skip (cn:14 Pre-Buffing Non-Accelerated, cn:9 Enhanced Summoned Celestials, cn:10 Enhanced Simulacrum). Components install fine if run before eet_end but the mod's Forge category (POST EET) intentionally positions it after.
ki.workaround: Known limitation of the POST EET phase. If all 3 components skip, no gameplay impact — the scripts simply don't install. Future: investigate whether EPS can safely move to EET FINALIZATION (before eet_end) without breaking its dependency chain.
ki.source: Session references extracted from description on 2026-04-21 during Phase 2.3 validator rollout: session 88733aac

sum: Adds improved AI scripts for your party members with 4 options: better auto-casting, smarter combat behavior, and custom tactics.

co.tp2n: Install Enhanced Scripts for Summoned Celestials
